# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImageController < ApplicationController
  def upload
    if params[:image].present?
      original_image = params[:image]
      output_format = params[:format] || 'png'
      output_size = params[:size] || '600x400'

      system("convert #{original_image} -resize #{output_size} output.#{output_format}")

      if $?.success?
        render plain: "Image converted successfully to #{output_format}"
      else
        render plain: "Error converting image", status: :internal_server_error
      end
    else
      render plain: "No image uploaded", status: :bad_request
    end
  end
end
